Subject: Northwell Health + Careerspan collaboration — next steps

Hi Brian,

Thank you for taking the time to meet today. It was great to learn about Northwell's innovative work in healthcare education and workforce development, particularly the Northwell Health Sciences High School program in Queens.

As discussed, here are the immediate next steps:
• I will coordinate a follow-up meeting to discuss partnership opportunities in more detail by Sat, Sep 27.

I believe there could be significant value in collaborating on career coaching and workforce development initiatives, especially given the healthcare industry's growing talent needs.

Please let me know your availability for that follow-up discussion.

P.S. I was particularly interested in the Northwell Health Sciences High School aspect of your work — it aligns well with our focus on early career development.

Best regards,
Vrijen Attawar
Co-founder, Careerspan
